author: Not about me, not about you, all about Jesus
We honor Jesus by choosing to grow
Intentionally loving each other like Jesus loves us
We will step up to stand out and rise up to serve
Together we pray, worship, grow, and go
Growing better by focusing on what matters most
If God’s Word says it, we believe it, obey it, and teach it
We will do anything with God’s help to connect people with Jesus
Faith is to believe what we do not see, and the reward of this faith is to see what we believe.
